title: MineLife Enhancements
description: This modpack is designed to overhaul most vanilla structures in all dimensions, and more mobs that still keep the vanilla feel.
body:
MineLife Enhancements overhauls Generated Structures, Nether and End Biomes, Mobs, and Decorations. This modpack is designed with multiplayer in mind, and has multiple QOL improvements and many can be enabled/disabled at will. The vanilla gameplay is not meant to change and MineLife Enhancements tries to keep zed gameplay intact while giving the game a fresh coat of paint.

Caves are made scary again. The world is interesting to explore again. Immersion is back to this beloved game again.

Warning: Immersive Portals as of right now only supports Iris 1.4.1. Do not try to update Iris to latest, and some shaders might not work with the older version of Iris.
